name: comprint-back
description: Production-ready FastAPI backend development plugin for Claude Code. Covers the full stack: project scaffolding, async SQLAlchemy, JWT auth, RBAC, error handling, testing, background tasks, and 10 documented error prevention patterns.

plugins.name: comprint-back
plugins.description: FastAPI development with 9 curated knowledge areas — architecture, API design, database, security, exceptions, logging, testing, background tasks, and common error prevention. Smart routing loads only what you need.
